release_chain_status: 20260603-0648 is the current implemented build after 20260603-0638. It adds admin/runtime drift-guard metadata to detect whether timestamp schema, current build metadata, prior runtime alignment, Layer 1 v2 rewrite metadata, and release-train metadata are observed.

versioning_schema_after_v60_3_30.rule: Future implemented builds use timestamp-based versioning. Historical V60.x labels remain lineage only.

top_level_tab_rule: Do not add more top-level tabs.

lineage.v60_3_30: Completed safe V60.3 release train through hardening
lineage.20260602_1730: Layer 1 v2 asset integration and Great Map doctrine intake
lineage.20260602_1735: Layer 1 v2 source rewrite shim active in runtime loader

drift_guard_rule: The admin payload should expose source_of_truth_drift_guard with status aligned or watch. Watch blockers indicate metadata observed late or not yet observed, not necessarily broken runtime behavior.
asset_rule: Layer 1 v2 assets are preferred only when available. Legacy PNG files remain fallbacks until browser QA confirms the v2 files.

great_map_doctrine.summary: CyberShield should evolve from a platform that contains a TrustMap into a platform that behaves like a map.
great_map_doctrine.status: doctrine intake for future design pass

runtime_import_rule: The executive shell loads first. The full TrustMap loads when requested.
performance_doctrine: Load the full TrustMap only when requested.
Warm TrustMap images after the shell is usable.
Prefer asset optimization over more runtime patches when images remain slow.
controlling_doctrine: No score without a model. No model without evidence. No evidence without traceability. No action without consequence.
prototype_boundary: The current GitHub Pages build is a lightweight static advisory prototype.
qa_priority: Verify initial app shell remains fast on phone
Open TrustMap and confirm no broken image icons appear before v2 binaries are uploaded
Confirm source_of_truth_drift_guard appears in admin payload
Confirm drift guard status is aligned or explains watch blockers
Upload the seven v2 PNG files to assets/layer1-v2/ when available
Confirm v2 assets replace legacy assets
Confirm no new top-level tab exists
